reconstruction.large_artifact_regeneration: future campaign artifacts reconstruct from exact registry, immutable source/runtime identities, and content manifests
reconstruction.reconstruct_command: env PYTHONPATH=${RCAE_PYGRC_ROOT}/src OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 BLIS_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 PYTHONHASHSEED=0 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -B experiments/2026-07-AE01-post-n30-demand-composition-atlas/scripts/p2_i3_i06_br_registration.py reconstruct --graph-root ${RCAE_PYGRC_ROOT} --output outputs/reconstruction/p2-i3-i06-br-registration-validation.reconstructed.json
reconstruction.timing_reexecution_rule: new_characterization_only; retained monotonic observations are validated not expected_to_recur_byte_exactly
reconstruction.validate_command: env PYTHONPATH=${RCAE_PYGRC_ROOT}/src OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 BLIS_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 PYTHONHASHSEED=0 PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -B experiments/2026-07-AE01-post-n30-demand-composition-atlas/scripts/p2_i3_i06_br_registration.py validate --graph-root ${RCAE_PYGRC_ROOT}

component_contract.native_identity_rule: retain_original_bytes_and_restoration_v2_digest; later resave byte equality not required
